content.text: {"component":"indexing","summary":"Indexing reads as a Symfony-native indexing/search-runtime component with strong internal scaffolding (dual-DB docker, smoke/probe tooling, governance, and docs), trending toward RC but with gaps in release tagging, Antora navigation, and verified test execution.","strengths":["Clear indexing identity and Symfony 8/PHP 8.4 targeting","Dual-DB runtime scaffolding via docker-compose (MySQL/Postgres) with smoke scripts","Static analysis and code-style tooling present (PHPStan, PHP-CS-Fixer) and CI scripts wired in composer","Operational/observability scaffolding present (ops/grafana, ops/alert, health script)","Governance surfaces present (.gate, MANIFEST files) and structured docs footprint"],"risks":["No git tags detected for releases","Antora navigation/root index not present, reducing docs discoverability","PHPUnit config only as .dist; unit test suite execution not evidenced","Kubernetes manifests not evidenced; runtime orchestration appears docker-only","Smoke/perf lanes presence is visible but CI integration is not evidenced"],"next_actions":["Create and publish semantic version tags and wire a release workflow","Add Antora nav.adoc and ROOT pages/index.adoc to surface docs in site","Promote phpunit.xml from .dist and ensure test suite runs in CI","Ensure CI runs phpstan, phpunit, and smoke/perf probes on PRs and main","Document and publish Grafana dashboards and alert runbooks in ops/","Add a brief runtime README in docker/ describing MySQL/Postgres flows and health checks"],"notes":["Repository scan on master at d10c828 (no exact tag)","Report source present under .antora-src; Antora nav/root index not detected","Composer scripts declare CI lanes; actual workflow wiring not inspected here"],"confidence":"medium","evidence_paths":["composer.json","docker/index-mysql.yaml","docker/index-postgres.yaml","bin/index-smoke-mysql.php","bin/index-smoke-postgres.php",".smoke/k6",".gate/MANIFEST.json","ops/grafana","ops/alert",".github/workflows","phpstan.neon","phpunit.xml.dist","config/services-index.php","ddl/index",".antora-src/modules/ROOT/pages/component/indexing/report/index.adoc","README.md","CHANGELOG.md","MANIFEST.yaml",".commanding/health.sh"],"suggested_score_overrides":{"product":null,"architecture":null,"runtime":null,"qa":null,"ops":null,"market":null,"overall":null},"metric_updates":{"product":{"summary":"Component identity and market-facing shape remain materially present, with a clear indexing/search-runtime focus and internal documentation footprint.","risks":["Docs navigation for Antora is missing, reducing discoverability","Release cadence not evidenced due to missing git tags"],"improvements":["Add Antora nav.adoc and ROOT pages/index.adoc","Create semantic version tags and maintain CHANGELOG on releases"],"evidence":["composer.json",".antora-src/modules/ROOT/pages/component/indexing/report/index.adoc","README.md","CHANGELOG.md"]},"architecture":{"summary":"Architecture presents a coherent indexing-runtime shape (config surfaces, DDL, dual-DB options) consistent with a governed internal subsystem.","risks":["Pre-release stabilization risk signaled by lack of tags","Integration boundaries not documented via Antora nav/index"],"improvements":["Document module boundaries and data flows in doc/index","Tag stable checkpoints to mark architectural baselines"],"evidence":["config/services-index.php","ddl/index","docker/index-mysql.yaml","docker/index-postgres.yaml","MANIFEST.yaml"]},"runtime":{"summary":"Runtime is materially present with docker-based MySQL/Postgres flows, smoke scripts, and health probes indicating an executable surface.","risks":["Orchestration appears docker-only; no Kubernetes readiness evidenced","CI execution of smoke/perf probes not evidenced"],"improvements":["Provide runtime README with start/stop, health, and troubleshooting","Add optional Kubernetes manifests or document deployment expectations"],"evidence":["docker/index-mysql.yaml","docker/index-postgres.yaml","bin/index-smoke-mysql.php","bin/index-smoke-postgres.php",".commanding/health.sh",".smoke/k6"]},"qa":{"summary":"QA posture is present via static analysis, code style, and phpunit configuration (.dist), with smoke/perf probes available.","risks":["PHPUnit only configured as .dist; active test suite execution not evidenced","Coverage reporting and CI wiring for tests not evidenced"],"improvements":["Promote phpunit.xml from .dist and run tests in CI","Surface coverage and static analysis results in CI artifacts"],"evidence":["phpstan.neon","phpunit.xml.dist",".php-cs-fixer.php","composer.json",".smoke/k6"]},"ops":{"summary":"Operational readiness is signaled by Grafana/alert scaffolding, governance gate, health scripts, and CI directory presence.","risks":["Alerting integrations and dashboards publication not evidenced","No release workflow or tags to anchor operational rollouts"],"improvements":["Publish and document dashboards/runbooks under ops/","Add release workflow with tagging and changelog publishing"],"evidence":["ops/grafana","ops/alert",".gate/MANIFEST.json",".github/workflows",".commanding/health.sh"]},"market":{"summary":"Business/portfolio alignment reads as an internal, governed indexing capability with maintained docs and changelog.","risks":["Proprietary license limits external adoption","Docs nav gaps may reduce portfolio-facing clarity"],"improvements":["Clarify positioning in README and doc/index with use-cases","Add Antora nav to improve documentation entry points"],"evidence":["composer.json","README.md","CHANGELOG.md",".antora-src/modules/ROOT/pages/component/indexing/report/index.adoc"]},"overall":{"summary":"Overall RC direction remains visible with strong internal indexing signals; remaining gaps are release tagging, docs navigation, and verified CI test execution.","risks":["Missing git tags keep the component pre-release","Docs navigation/index missing for Antora site","Test execution/coverage not evidenced in CI"],"improvements":["Introduce semantic version tags and a release workflow","Add Antora nav/index and verify site rendering","Ensure phpunit/phpstan/smoke run in CI with artifacts"],"evidence":[".github/workflows","phpunit.xml.dist","phpstan.neon",".antora-src/modules/ROOT/pages/component/indexing/report/index.adoc","CHANGELOG.md"]}}}
